top_signals.title: SoftBank Group shares soar over 16% as Nvidia earnings signal strong AI momentum
top_signals.summary: SoftBank Group is closely tied to the AI boom through its stake in Arm Holdings, whose chip designs are used in AI servers and data centers powered by Nvidia systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sturdy Tanpopo is a ‘dandy lioness’
top_signals.summary: This 4-year-old dog has loads of energy and would make a great addition to an active household.
